title: Sandbar totem
description:
just a silly resource pack that replaces totem of undying with a vindictive Sandbar plush
this resource pack includes:
•custom model
•custom texture
•custom name
•custom subtitle text
•custom sound effect
body:
this resource pack brings to life a sandbar plush from the song "Trash Talkin'" by YonKaGor and Kennyoung, you can modify and use models files however you want by using blockbench

it will replace totem of undying and all releated to it with sandbar themed ones!
> rename your totem to 'sandbar' to turn it into plush

character by yonkagor and kennyoung
